hooks.command:
bash -lc if\ \[\ -f\ wiki/index.md\ \]\;\ then'
'\ \ printf\ \'\\n\[llm-wiki\ index\]\\n\''
'\ \ sed\ -n\ \'1,160p\'\ wiki/index.md'
'fi'
'if\ \[\ -f\ wiki/log.md\ \]\;\ then'
'\ \ printf\ \'\\n\[llm-wiki\ recent\ log\]\\n\''
'\ \ sed\ -n\ \'1,80p\'\ wiki/log.md'
'fi # LLM WIKI SESSION START
